title: machaeranthera tanacetifolia
intro: Machaeranthera tanacetifolia, also known as tansy mustard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic effects, which can help to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Machaeranthera tanacetifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural remedy for colds and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are typically used in small doses due to the plant's potency.
